task-management.name: task-management
task-management.description: Track and manage feature subtasks with status, dependencies, and validation

varlock.name: varlock
varlock.description: Secure environment variable management. Ensures secrets are never exposed in terminals, logs, traces, or context. Uses Varlock CLI for validation and masked output.
varlock.author: wrsmith108

security-bluebook-builder.name: security-bluebook-builder
security-bluebook-builder.description: Build security Blue Books for sensitive apps — structured threat models, data classification, auth policy, incident response, and security gates using MUST/SHOULD/CAN language.
security-bluebook-builder.author: SHADOWPR0

mcp-harness.name: mcp-harness
mcp-harness.description: Plugin orchestration harness. Explicit approval, surgical delegation, append-only audit trail.
mcp-harness.author: allura
mcp-harness.rationale: Core infrastructure for MCP server and skill orchestration. Defines the approval gate that all other skills and servers pass through.
